content.en:
Ye Tian walked out of the wooden house and immediately left here, and did not stay here.

After all, there wasn't the opportunity he needed.

Moreover, he was now basically sure that there was definitely a supreme powerhouse in this world, even more powerful than the First God Lord and the First Demon Lord!

Of course, this is only his initial speculation now, and the real secrets of this world may be deeper than he imagined.

Ye Tian continued to fly quickly, but he didn't fly for long, and he found traces of battle and a corpse on a large land.

This is the corpse of an angel clan galaxy-level powerhouse.

Judging from the circumstances of the corpse's death, it was killed from the front with a spear.

Seeing this corpse, Ye Tian did not have the slightest wave.

Obviously, this angel was slain by a strong man of another race.

The relationship between the human race and the angel race was originally very ordinary, so the death of this angel clan powerhouse did not cause Ye Tian any emotions.

Then, Ye Tian continued to move forward, looking for unknown opportunities.

Bang!!!

There was a fluctuation of the battle ahead, and after Ye Tian sensed it, he teleported over.

In the blink of an eye, Ye Tian came to the place of battle and saw the scene of the battle between multiple races.

The strong men of the gods, demons, angels, elves, yakshas, and other races are constantly fighting.

As for the purpose of their fight, Ye Tian could see it at a glance.

Not far away there is a manor, and these people are fighting for this manor.

A manor!

Ye Tian's heart was moved, the wooden house before was very mysterious, although it didn't have what he wanted, it was obviously not an extraordinary place.

Now, this manor is very large, and there is a faint power to protect this place, so that this place is not affected by the battle, no matter how these star-level powerhouses fight, they can't shake this manor.

If there are very precious treasures in this manor, wouldn't it be a lot of money.

Before he knew the secrets of this world, Ye Tian felt that this manor was a very important opportunity.

Swish!

He teleported over and appeared in front of the men.

"I want this manor!"

Ye Tian announced in a very domineering tone.

At this time, the others noticed Ye Tian's existence and sneered one by one.

The starry-level peak powerhouse of the Protoss looked at Ye Tian, recognized it, and immediately said, "Who should I be?" It turned out to be the Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch of the Human Race. Wanfa True Monarch, it is said that you are the galaxy level promoted by His Royal Highness the Supreme Level, and if you fight at the same level, I admit that you are not your opponent, but you are only at the peak of the galaxy level now. We are at the peak of the galaxy level, even here, the cultivation is suppressed very strongly, but it is not difficult to defeat you. "

"Wanfa True Monarch, if you are at the peak of the galaxy level, let us go, and we will get out immediately, but you are only at the peak of the galaxy level, and you are not qualified to do so. "

"Hahaha, this era of the human race has finally given birth to a supreme-level highness. I didn't expect the human race to be willing to let you, the Supreme Highness, come here. Today, we will let the Supreme Highness of the human race fall here. "

Swish!

The peak powerhouse of the galaxy level of the demon clan, without saying a word, attacked in an instant, and seemed to want to kill Ye Tian instantly.

But just before this Demon Clan's galaxy-level peak powerhouse was about to hit Ye Tian, Ye Tian instantly slashed out.

"Sky Moon Knife!

Carrying the power of the Chaos Dao, a supreme-level sword path peerless slash out.

This knife is too fast, too fierce, too accurate!

The Starriver-level peak demon powerhouse had no room for resistance at all, and was directly cut in half with a single sword, and fell here in an instant.

"What!"

The other clan powerhouses present were dumbfounded one by one when they saw the Demon Clan's galaxy-level peak powerhouse being killed.

"It's too weak!"

Ye Tian muttered.

His defiant eyes and invincible momentum instantly shocked everyone present.

At this moment, no one saw Ye Tian clearly anymore.

"Impossible!"

Another galaxy-level peak demon powerhouse shouted: "

Kai Mo is our Demon Clan's galaxy-level peak powerhouse, he used to be an Eternal Highness, his combat power is extremely powerful, even if you are a Supreme Highness, but how can you kill him with a single sword when you are only at the peak of the galaxy level. "

Others don't want to believe it, but that's the way it is!

"Because you are too weak to imagine my strength. I just let you go, and if you don't leave, then stay here forever. Ye Tiandao.

"Chaos True Technique, Black Lotus Realm!"

One by one, the Black Lotus Realm flew out, enveloping these powerhouses of all races, and they tried to leave, but the speed of the Black Lotus Realm was too fast, enveloping them one by one.

Then, the Black Lotus Realm annihilated everything.

There was not even a scream, many strong people were annihilated, and occasionally those who missed were also killed by Ye Tian in one fell swoop.

In the blink of an eye, all of these galaxy-level powerhouses fell here.

After confirming that there were no survivors here, Ye Tian walked towards the manor.

Walking into the manor, Ye Tian felt a simple atmosphere.

For the first time, Ye Tian felt the existence of energy in this world.

The energy in this manor is very gentle, nourishing the body and soul, and it is a very rare energy.

Ye Tian searched the manor. There were several places covered by special forces, and there was no way for him to get in.

But the rest of the world did not hinder him, and let him enter.

In the end, Ye Tian only found a more useful place, which was a study.

In the study, Ye Tian found some books, which were made of special paper and possessed eternal and immortal powers.

Most of the books are about everyday life. Poetry, stories, and the like.

But there was a book that recorded something that Ye Tian was very interested in.

Detached!

That's right, detachment.

It says that above the strongest, there is detachment. A universe that allows only a few people to be detached at most. There are two ways to detachment.

The first way is to take the path of rebellion, and when you are at the emperor level, you must break the restrictions of the universe and become a rebel.

The second way is to follow the normal path of cultivation, after becoming the strongest. then you need to fight against the origin of the universe. Forcibly break the suppression of the origin of the universe, and then you can transcend.

"There are two ways. "

Ye Tian was very surprised.

As mentioned above, the second method is very difficult and difficult. It is more difficult than the first, and the second is not the right way. It is impossible to achieve it on your own.

Because living beings themselves were born in the universe, how could they be more terrifying than the forces of the universe?

To detach from the second method, it is possible to do so with the help of an external force, that is, the power of chaos. Being in the universe to harness the power of chaos requires a special approach.

Ye Tian didn't know how to do the second method, and he didn't care much, anyway, he was already walking the path of the anti-heaven now, as long as he didn't fall, he would be able to transcend.

There is also a message on this book, which surprised Ye Tian, saying that once he is detached, he can still stay in the universe for a while.

During this period of time, the transcendent person can shield the cosmic induction, but not for too long, and once it stays too long, it will still be sensed by the origin of the universe.

When the time comes, unless you directly confront the origin of the universe, you will have to leave.

Seeing this, Ye Tian had a doubt, how did the author of this book know so clearly, unless......

The author of this book is a detached person!!
